_comment.1: A/B HARNESS for the adaptive Filtered Smith Predictor. This
_comment.3: anyloop:attenuation_test inserted between the CoM sinks and the
_comment.4: fsp -- exactly where it sits in attenuation_test.json, so the
_comment.5: measurement is apples-to-apples. It holds the loop OPEN for
_comment.6: open_time s (zeroes the error into the fsp, so its command
_comment.7: parks at 0 and the DAC sits at bias) while recording the raw
_comment.8: CoM error, then CLOSES, waits settle_time for the Kalman/adapt
_comment.9: to converge, records closed_time s, and writes attenuation_fsp
_comment.10: .dat/.pdf: per-axis open/closed PSD overlays, closed/open dB,
_comment.11: and the per-band RMS + mean/jitter table. TO COMPARE: run this,
_comment.12: then read the closed RMS-about-mean per axis and put it next to
_comment.14: The fsp WINS only if it beats those on the predictable 10-64 Hz
_comment.15: band without pumping the >64 Hz waterbed or any line. Keep runs
_comment.16: >=120 s per phase -- the vibration environment is nonstationary.
_comment.17: Same open/closed times as the 2026-07-14 attenuation10 run so
_comment.18: the two PSDs share a frequency grid and averaging.

params._roi_note: no start_x/start_y: with the coarse biases below (1.95/2.02) the beam parks in the driver-default ROI; copied from steering_tuned.json after the 2026-07-16 realignment.

pipeline._note1: THE TEST. Sits after the CoM sinks (watchers see the true error) and before the FSP. During the open phase the FSP is fed zeros and parks at 0; settle_time covers its cold-start convergence and adaptation after closure. pixel_scale 15.5 = (32-1)/2 for both axes. This is the attenuation11 test sequence with only the camera/alignment and measured timing updated.
pipeline._note2: compare the closed RMS-about-mean here against attenuation10_lead_fc64 (x 0.244, y 0.151 px). Same nfft/open/closed as that run for a shared grid.

params.config:
ATTENUATION11 FSP RETEST -- new laser alignment, camera rate, and current Bode plant gains
Same continuously adapting full-band FSP as the successful attenuation11 run: broad_order=512, broad_mu=.03, start_delay=2 s, ramp=10 s; no frozen-weights test mode or safety-trip tuning
Camera/CoM match steering_tuned.json: 32x32 ROI, exposure 50, gain 100, 20x20 tracked window, threshold 22; coarse offsets 1.95/2.02 V
Current Bode plots fsm_bodex_716/fsm_bodey_716 give low-frequency normalized gains Kx=.868 and Ky=.630
Loop delay from the bode phase fits (5-300 Hz slope + 1 hidden frame): x 1.484 ms = 5.62 fr, y 1.681 ms = 6.37 fr at 3788 Hz. PER-AXIS delays: y global 6+0.0 (validated), x override 5+0.62 (bode fit; 5x latency runs 21:22-21:26 give departure 1.06 ms / 50% 1.32 ms = 5.00 fr every run). Departure-latency 4.02 fr was 1.6-2.3 fr short and caused the 310 Hz spiral of 07-16 20:55
All remaining observer and modal parameters match attenuation11; output is reported at 15.5 px per normalized unit
refs: Kulcsar 2006 / Petit 2008 / Meimon 2010 / Correia 2010

pipeline._note: controller under test; params identical to steering_fsp.json except start_delay/ramp are short here because attenuation_test owns the open/closed sequencing. VERIFY the sign of K with a push test before running this closed.

x._delay: per-axis override, same numbers as steering_fsp.json: x bode 5.62 fr, latency 5x runs 50% = 5.00 fr; y inherits global 6
